nasb.text: Now one of them, when he saw that he had been healed, turned back, glorifying God with a loud voice,

esv.text: Then one of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, praising God with a loud voice;

cnv.text: 內中有一個人見自己已經好了，就回來大聲頌讚　神，

ccb.text: 其中一个发现自己痊愈了，就跑回来，高声赞美上帝，

csbs.text: 其中有一个人看见自己得了痊愈，就回来大声地荣耀神，
